productName: DBG Mini 5 pack - 2.5g - Kush Breath (Darkstar/Onyx) & Black Apple (Grow Bros) (H) DOH
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Kush Breath flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, lemon, and apple, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
